caption: The video features an elderly man with white hair tied back, wearing glasses and a traditional-style shirt adorned with bird patterns and colorful stripes. He is standing at a podium with a microphone, addressing an audience. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background. The man is speaking earnestly, occasionally looking down, possibly at notes or a script on the podium. His attire includes a necklace with beads and a pendant, adding to his cultural presentation. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, suggesting that the event may be related to this organization. The overall atmosphere conveys a sense of formality and respect, as the man delivers his speech with a composed demeanor.
